LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS SANDRA NAHAN, BARBARA MENDELSOHN, RICHARD MENDELSOHN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 17. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE OTHER CHALLENGED CAUSES OF ACTION TO PLEAD HOW THE CLAIMS ARE NOT TIME BARRED AND TO PLEAD THE REQUIRED ELEMENTS, IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-09-2008 CONTINUED TO JUL-21-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. JUN-09-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS RICHARD MENDELSOHN, SANDRA NAHAN AND BARBARA MENDELSOHN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT- THE ALLEGATIONS RELATING TO ANY OF THE REMAINING INDIVIDUALS INCLUDING MR. MENDELSOHN CREATE A FIDUCIARY DUTY THAT WOULD JUSTIFY THE CLAIMS THAT ARE BROUGHT AGAINST HIM. IT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CLAIMS AGAINST BURHAM, HER ESTATE, AND THOSE ACTING AS ITS REPRESENTATIVES PURSUANT TO C C P 366.2. CAUSES OF ACTION 1 THROUGH 4 IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAVE RUN. IT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS CAUSES OF ACTION 10 THROUGH 12 BECAUSE THE REMAINING DEFENDANTS OWED NO FIDUCIARY DUTY OR TORT LAW DUTY TO PLAINTIFF. IT IS SUSTAINED WITH 15 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 5, 6,7, AND 8 TO PLEAD WHAT, IF ANY, STATEMENTS OR ACTS MEETING THE ELEMENTS OF THESE TORTS WERE MADE OR COMMITTED BY THE REMAINING DEFENDANTS WITHIN THE LIMITATIONS PERIOD. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 14. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-10-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. STEPHEN D. FINESTON, TEL. NO. 421-2024 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JONATHAN M. ELDAN OF COBLENTZ, PATCH, DUFFY & BASS, TEL. NO. 772-5702 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANTS RICHARD MENDELSOHN, SANDRA NAHAN AND BARBARA MENDELSOHN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT- THE ALLEGATIONS RELATING TO ANY OF THE REMAINING INDIVIDUALS INCLUDING MR. MENDELSOHN CREATE A FIDUCIARY DUTY THAT WOULD JUSTIFY THE CLAIMS THAT ARE BROUGHT AGAINST HIM. IT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CLAIMS AGAINST BURHAM, HER ESTATE, AND THOSE ACTING AS ITS REPRESENTATIVES PURSUANT TO C C P 366.2. CAUSES OF ACTION 1 THROUGH 4 IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAVE RUN. IT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS CAUSES OF ACTION 10 THROUGH 12 BECAUSE THE REMAINING DEFENDANTS OWED NO FIDUCIARY DUTY OR TORT LAW DUTY TO PLAINTIFF. IT IS SUSTAINED WITH 15 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 5, 6,7, AND 8 TO PLEAD WHAT, IF ANY, STATEMENTS OR ACTS MEETING THE ELEMENTS OF THESE TORTS WERE MADE OR COMMITTED BY THE REMAINING DEFENDANTS WITHIN THE LIMITATIONS PERIOD. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 14. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/AL
